# Context7 Query Prompts

Use these query shapes to refresh the source context before answering Livewire 4 Properties questions. Always keep the query scoped to `/websites/livewire_laravel_4_x`.

## Public State And Helpers
```text
Livewire 4 properties documentation: public properties, component state, class default values, mount initialization, data passed into mount, fill, reset, pull, form object property helpers, all documented helper method signatures, examples, and caveats. Return documented APIs and caveats only.
```

## Supported Types And Custom Types
```text
Livewire 4 property types documentation: primitive public property types, common PHP and Laravel property types, property dehydration and hydration, Eloquent model and collection properties, Wireable custom property types, Synthesizers, examples, limitations, and caveats. Return documented types and examples only.
```

## Binding And Validation
```text
Livewire 4 wire:model and property validation documentation: binding inputs to public properties, nested property paths, form object properties, update timing, .live, .blur, .change, .enter, .lazy, .debounce, .throttle, .number, .boolean, .fill, .deep, .preserve-scroll, #[Validate], rules(), validation messages, and real-time validation. Return documented directive modifiers, attributes, method names, and caveats only.
```

## Property Attributes
```text
Livewire 4 property attributes documentation: #[Locked], #[Url], #[Session], #[Computed], #[Reactive], #[Modelable], #[Validate], imports, targets, options, examples, limitations, caching behavior, query string behavior, nested component property behavior, and security notes. Return documented syntax and caveats only.
```

## Security And JavaScript Access
```text
Livewire 4 property security and JavaScript access documentation: public properties visible to the browser, treating public properties as user input, property tampering, #[Locked], Eloquent model automatic locking, dehydration metadata exposure, morph maps, $wire property reads and writes, $wire.set, deferred syncing, validation, authorization, and persistence caveats. Return documented APIs and warnings only.
```
